data.title: User-Centric Design
data.description: Interface prioritizes user needs and accessibility for a wider audience.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design principles and accessibility standards compliance.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified options and interfaces to reduce user decision time.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design with clear call-to-action elements.

data.title: Consistency and Standards
data.description: Maintains consistency in design elements for a coherent experience.
data.technical_spec: Standardized icons, typography, and functionality across platforms.

data.title: Feedback Loops
data.description: Immediate feedback on user interactions to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: Interactive animations and error message prompts.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing interfaces are perceived as more usable.
data.technical_spec: Enhanced visuals and intuitive navigation paths.
